category_sources: Official projectdiscovery/proxify README describes it as a versatile portable proxy for HTTP/HTTPS traffic capture, manipulation, and replay.
source_facts.description says proxify captures, manipulates, and replays HTTP/HTTPS traffic.
display_name_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery documentation and repository use the product name Proxify.
docs_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery docs include a dedicated Proxify overview.
Official ProjectDiscovery tools index lists Proxify among the open-source tools.
Official projectdiscovery/proxify README documents features, installation, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/projectdiscovery/proxify, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official proxify README lists proxy, MITM, traffic dump, filtering, and replay features.
source_facts.description identifies HTTP/HTTPS capture, manipulation, and replay.
